title: Trade Support Analyst - Contract
description:
Job Summary

You will join our client’s team as a Trade Support Analyst specializing in Structured and Flow Credit Derivatives, driving operational excellence by ensuring accuracy, mitigating risk, and enhancing efficiency across the trade lifecycle. You will collaborate with clients, Sales, Trading desks, and cross-functional partners to deliver seamless execution and continuous process improvements.

Responsibilities

  • Resolve trade-related queries and issues by partnering with clients, Sales, Trading desks, and stakeholders to ensure timely and accurate trade processing
  • Monitor and control operational risk throughout the trade processing lifecycle for Structured and Flow Credit Derivatives to safeguard business integrity
  • Act as a subject matter expert by identifying and implementing opportunities to mitigate risk and improve operational efficiency
  • Manage real-time trade booking exceptions between the trading desk and sales force to maintain data accuracy and trade integrity
  • Collaborate with technology and business partners to enhance systems, workflows, and automation, driving continuous operational improvements
  • Participate in industry and regulatory initiatives, adapting processes to comply with evolving standards and maintain competitive advantage
  • Continuously review and refine processes to ensure timeliness, quality, and cost-effectiveness in trade support operations

Preferred competencies and qualifications

  • Knowledge of credit derivatives and familiarity with the current regulatory landscape to support compliance and risk management
  • 2–5 years of experience in Finance or a related field, demonstrating relevant domain expertise
  • Ability to maintain composure and effectiveness under pressure to ensure consistent performance in a fast-paced environment
  • Strong proficiency in Microsoft Office Suite, especially Excel, with the ability to quickly learn and adapt to new systems
  • Demonstrated enthusiasm, initiative, and a collaborative team orientation to contribute positively to team dynamic


Licence : 99C3289
R1100620

postedCompany.description:
SKILLSFORCE MANAGEMENT CONSULTANCY PTE LTD

 

Integrating People Competency

 

Skillsforce provides Recruitment and Human Capital Solutions tailored to our clients’ needs so that they can meet the challenges of today’s dynamic business environment.


About Us:
Skillsforce Management Consultancy Pte. Ltd. was established in 1998 and has since grown into a successful enterprise specializing in recruitment for temporary, contract, and permanent positions. Our services also extend to HR Consultancy for start-up companies and HR Outsource Services for SMEs. Additionally, we support work pass services, including application, renewal, and cancellation of work passes.

Our Unique Approach:
What sets us apart from our competitors is our focus on integrating people competencies. We don’t just recruit the most competent talents; we ensure they align with our clients’ cultural fit and corporate values, helping them achieve their business goals and objectives. We pride ourselves on providing high-level search services while offering competitive rates.


Our Agile and Customized Services:
Thanks to our boutique setup, we can respond quickly to our clients' needs, customizing our service offerings and pricing to meet their dynamic business requirements. We stay closely aligned with our clients' objectives and goals.
